name: websantario-v2
description: Sitio Sanatorio Adventista de Asuncion con panel admin parametrico

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web,admin -c blue,green,magenta "pnpm --filter @sa/api dev" "pnpm --filter @sa/web dev" "pnpm --filter @sa/admin dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @sa/api build && pnpm --filter @sa/web build && pnpm --filter @sa/admin build
